raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within reach of the right arm and there is clear free space to push it forward (away from box_1/box_2) without colliding with the boxes or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is shifted forward on the tabletop, creating a larger clearance region in front of box_1 and box_2 for safe arm approach."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is reachable from its outer (left/front-left) side and the right arm can make light contact without occlusion by box_2; the cup is no longer directly in front of the boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is constrained against sliding while separating it from the attached box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm has access to the outer (right) side of box_2, and there is free space to move box_2 rightward to break its attachment to box_1 without hitting the cup or table edge; box_1 is stabilized by the right arm.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is shifted rightward and no longer attached to box_1, leaving box_1 isolated and accessible."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is now separated from box_2 with sufficient lateral clearance on both sides for the two claws to contact opposing faces; no nearby objects obstruct the lift path.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped with both end-effectors and lifted off the table (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within reach of the right arm and there is clear free space to push it forward (away from box_1/box_2) without colliding with the boxes or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is shifted forward on the tabletop, creating a larger clearance region in front of box_1 and box_2 for safe arm approach.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is reachable from its outer (left/front-left) side and the right arm can make light contact without occlusion by box_2; the cup is no longer directly in front of the boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is constrained against sliding while separating it from the attached box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm has access to the outer (right) side of box_2, and there is free space to move box_2 rightward to break its attachment to box_1 without hitting the cup or table edge; box_1 is stabilized by the right arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is shifted rightward and no longer attached to box_1, leaving box_1 isolated and accessible.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is now separated from box_2 with sufficient lateral clearance on both sides for the two claws to contact opposing faces; no nearby objects obstruct the lift path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped with both end-effectors and lifted off the table (picked up).
